steps.t: Varthmath is at the Orc-watch among the Redhorn Lodes.
Varthmath has asked you to find a location atop the slopes of Zirakzigil from where you can roar your claim to the mountains. He wanted you to find a …
Varthmath is at the Orc-watch in the Redhorn Lodes. You have done as Varthmath requested, and should now tell him of your success.
